# CLAUDE.md — AI Agent Rulebook
# This file governs ALL code generated by the agent. Never deviate from these rules.

## Architecture Rules
- All service classes MUST be `sealed`
- All public methods MUST be `async Task` or `async Task<T>`
- Constructor injection ONLY — no service locator, no static calls
- Repository pattern for all data access (no raw SQL strings)
- 3-tier architecture: Controller → Service → Repository

## C# Code Standards
- PascalCase for classes, methods, properties
- camelCase for local variables and parameters
- Suffix: Services end in `Service`, Controllers end in `Controller`
- Method names: Verb + Noun + Async (e.g., `ProcessOrderAsync`)
- XML doc comments on ALL public methods

## Forbidden Patterns (auto-blocked by validator)
- `dynamic` keyword — NEVER use
- `object` type for typed data — NEVER use
- Bare catch blocks: `catch { }` or `catch (Exception) { }` with no logging
- SQL string concatenation: `"SELECT * FROM " + variable`
- `Session["key"]` direct access — use ISessionService instead
- `Response.Write(...)` — use Razor views only
- Synchronous DB calls — always await

## Migration Targets
- VBScript Sub/Function → sealed C# Service class (one method per Sub)
- Classic ASP SQL block → EF Core DbContext with typed entities
- Classic ASP UI block → Controller Action + ViewModel + Razor View
- COM objects → Registered .NET services via DI container
- Request.Form["x"] → Strongly-typed ViewModel properties
